titleStmt.title: SII 16.38: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswami and G. S. Gai
No. 38. (A.R. No. 429 of 1920.) RĀMĀPURAM, GOOTY TALUK, ANANTAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab in the Rāmēśvara temple.
This is dated Śaka 1419, Piṅgala, Chaitra śu. 9, Saturday, Śrīrāmanavami, corresponding to 1497 A.D., March 13. The week-day, however, was Monday.

It records a gift of the village Jarivūṭi (i.e. Jalivūṭla) to god Rāmadēva of the village by Kēsama-nāyaniṅgāru, with the permission of the king, for the merit of Immaḍi Narasiṁharāya and Narasā-nāyaka. The village is said to be situated in Penna-māgāṇi of Jagatāpi-Gutti which is said to have been obtained by the donor as nāyaṅkara from the king.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī jayābhyudaya śālivāhana śakava
rṣaṁbulu 1419 Agunēṭi piṁgaḷasaṁvatsara cayitra
śu 9 sthiravāraṁnāṁḍu Ādimūrtti Ayina jalivūṭla śrīmaṁnma
hādēvuṁḍaina rāmādēvarakunu trikālaṁ ṣōḍacōpacārapūjā
naivēdyālu Aṁgaraṁgavayibhavālu naḍapuṭakaIṁni
śrīmaṁnmahāmaThis
ṁḍalēśvara mēdinīmīsaragaṁḍa kaṭhārisāḷuva sāḷuva yiṁmaḍi na
rasiṁhvarāyamahārāyalakuṁnu narasānāyanikiṁni śrī
maṁnmahānāyaṁkācāryya jaṁni ceṁnamanāyani komā
ruṁḍu kēsama nāyaniṁgāru mā nāyaṁkrānaku cellēṭi
jarivūṭi grāmaṁ Ā rāmayadēvuniki samarpiṁcenani
viṁnapaṁ cē stē vini yī dharmmaṁ pūrvavṛddhikekkanu śāśanastaṁgā
samarpiṁccumanina rāyala nirūpaṁvallā nāyani
Ānatiniṁni sētubaṁdhurāmēśvaramaṁdu śrīrāmanava
mi puṁṇyakālamaṁdu sōmavāravrataphalaśidhikayiṁ
ni mā pitṛmātṛ vubhayavaṁśa narakōttāraṇakaIṁni jaga
tāpiguttiki cellē peṁnamāgiṇilō mā nāyaṁkrāna
ku cele jarivūṭigrāmaṁ sētubaṁdhurā mēśvaradēvuni sā
ṁnidhyamaṁdu dakṣiṇavāraṇāsi Anabaḍe śrīśailapratisa
māna visēṣasthalamayina jarivūṭi rāmayadēvuniki sama
rpiṁstimi gāna Ā jarivūṭi grāmānaku dikulaku mērakaṭlu
lūrpuku taṁḍasimānivaṁka dakṣiṇānaku peṁnayē
ru paḍumaṭiki cikirenumānidōva vuttarānaku tōḍu
ku maṭṭikanuma yī catusīma polamulōṁgala kāluva
lu ceruvulu bāvulu kāḍāraṁba sahā kalakorunu talagala
Ādāyamu yēmigalaviṁni gṛhārāmakṣētranidhinikṣēva
jalapāṣāṇaAkṣiṇaĀgāmisidhasādhyālanēṭi Aṣṭabhō
gatējasvāṁmyataluṁnu Ācaṁdrārkastāyigā celeṭaṭlu
gā rāmayadēvuniki samarpiṁ stimani jaṁne ceṁnamanāya
ni komāruṁḍu kēsamanāyaṁḍu Icina dharmaśāśanaṁ
Iṁdukevvaru tappinā kāśilō pitṛmātṛgōbrāṁhmaṇavadha cēśi
navāru celiyalini cēsukoṁnavāru . yēkaiva bhaginī lōkē
sarvēṣāmēva bhūbhujāṁ . na bhōjyā na karagrāṁhyā sivārpi
tavasuṁdharā . sarvēṣāṁ vardhi(rji)tō bhuṁṅkte sōpi svava
dhir(ji)taṁ na tu . śunaḥ kaṣṭatarō nīcō . svayaṁdattāpahārakaḥ .
Digital edition of SII 16.38 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
